title: Few-Shot Learning: Learning from Limited Data
author: Cedar Martinez
AI Researcher
description: Train models with minimal examples using meta-learning—but generalization fails
content:
Few-shot learning enables models to adapt to new tasks with only a handful of examples.

**Related Chronicles**: [The Adaptation Failure (2038)](/docs/articles/adaptation-failure-2038)
